title: Tired
description: A mod that lets you sleep whenever you want
body:
Tired is a Minecraft mod that allows you to sleep at all time, no more "You can sleep only at night or during thunderstorms"! Now you can ALWAYS sleep! And if you want, you can set up a "sleep schedule" of your own.

By default this mod will allow you to sleep to the closest quarter of the day.
You can configure what part of the day it'll sleep towards in the config.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
